idle_occupied.description: Character occupied with a task, minimal movement

standing_behind_counter.description: Standing position behind a shop counter or desk

lean_forward_examine.description: Leaning forward to inspect something closely

lean_in_examine.description: Leaning in toward a subject for inspection

head_tilt_return_to_work.description: Brief acknowledging head tilt before returning to task

still_listening.description: Body goes still, attention fully directed at speaker

slow_set_down_object.description: Deliberately setting down a held object with controlled irritation

fidget_hands.description: Nervous hand fidgeting, wringing or picking at fingers

step_back_arms_close.description: Defensive half-step back, arms drawn close to body

small_smile_look_away.description: Brief pleased smile with averted gaze

return_to_ledger.description: Gaze drops back to written work, conversation deprioritised

hand_below_counter.description: Hand moves below counter level — reaching for something unseen

nod_note_in_ledger.description: Approving nod followed by writing a note

lean_forward_inspect.description: Leaning forward to inspect an offered item or person

gaze_targets.downward_task_focused: Eyes on hands or work surface
gaze_targets.attentive_customer: Direct eye contact with speaker, service posture
